The '''''Quillion''''' was a [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] in the [[Kathol Republic Navy]].

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Quillion'' responded to a distress call from the ''[[Bravado III]]'', alongside her sister ships ''[[Juno II]]'', ''[[Mirandine]]'', ''[[Siroma]]'', [[Solidarity (Marauder-class)|''Solidarity'']], and [[Triumph (Marauder-class)|''Triumph'']]. Together, they intercepted the modified [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' and impounded it on [[Dayark]].
